overall.description: A first-person perspective walk along a dark wooded trail at night, following a dirt path beside a wooden split-rail fence. The footage appears to be rendered in a game engine, featuring low-light conditions with cool blue-green tones and dense forest vegetation.

scene_state.functional_zone: dark forest trail with wooden fencing

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along a narrow dirt path bordered by a wooden fence on the left and dense trees on the right

entered.detail: rustic wooden fence running parallel to the path on the left side
narrow unpaved trail winding through the forest with grass edges
thick trees and underbrush lining the right side of the trail
dark blue night sky visible through gaps in the tree canopy on the left

segments.scene_description: The camera moves forward along a dark, narrow forest trail at night. A wooden split-rail fence runs along the left side while dense trees and vegetation occupy the right. The path is unpaved dirt, and the scene is illuminated by ambient low light, revealing the cool-toned natural environment.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous forward movement along a secluded forest trail shrouded in the cool, dim light of night. It begins by advancing along a narrow, unpaved dirt path, where the perspective is tightly framed by the surrounding wilderness. As the camera pushes forward, a wooden split-rail fence maintains a steady presence along the left side, contrasting with the dense, encroaching vegetation on the right. The scene remains immersed in ambient low light, emphasizing the deep blue-green tones of the natural environment as the journey continues deeper into the woods.
